attributes.action: Stop taxing Longer Separation Allowance on British armed forces
attributes.additional_details: LSA also helps ease the emotional, personal, and financial strain these separations place on soldiers and their loved ones.
attributes.background: We want the Government to stop taxing Longer Separation Allowance (LSA) which compensates British service personnel for unavoidable extended time away from their families due to deployments and training.
